entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","eb19dfe9-809b-487c-a5d5-f2f140ace536","o|","manual","b|F","a|","0faa1d9c-6fea-49b0-ac7a-a38850da833e","a|8|D","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S|T","Angular .NET Postgres Development Setup\n","2026-03-05T21:41:18.899Z","2026-03-05T22:28:51.576Z","gpt-5-1","isAgentConversation","a|Z","b|T","o|a|b","n|0","d919511f-868c-47eb-91ea-c2c41c511abf","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|f|g|h|i|j|k|l","3bf3e564-2cf2-4b3c-ae8e-94164f617ce7","7f79c9e0-00d3-4925-87bf-8b2b05f8fac9","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VD21F5D","seen","o|m|n|o|p|q|d|r|s","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|h|u|v|w|i|l","exchange-pointer","d074fc30-edc1-4701-a918-cd085539ed70","2026-03-05T21:47:52.227Z","Schreibe mir ein perfektes Setup für Development und Deployment in eine Markdown, ich will Angular und dotnet verwenden gepaart mit einer Restapi und Postgres DB. Die App soll dem Nutzer die Option geben, Abläufe für ihre Teams zu speichern","o|x|y|z|10|11|q|s","ee0466e7-5c54-4d8c-a520-1e25ac60dd3d","2026-03-05T21:49:04.910Z","schreib das alles in eine md file für die Anforderungen ","o|x|y|13|14|15|q|s","edf64a4b-c3e5-4047-b419-31cdacbd46e6","2026-03-05T21:50:13.659Z","schreib es bitte in eine markdown datei damit ich auch später Zugriff drauf habe","o|x|y|17|18|19|q|s","631498c4-8c3c-43cf-a0bf-6b58a441fd45","2026-03-05T21:50:34.445Z","","o|x|y|1B|1C|1D|q|s","341281a8-4f91-42ef-a8ad-d35b72587d98","5c4debb1-0b16-42e3-91f7-a8ac452171fa","n|VD23aYd","o|m|1F|1G|p|q|r|1H|s","14a58a22-842c-4c4e-94b7-72f7c1c340e2","2026-03-05T21:54:28.406Z","Plane mit mir, wie man für ein Sportteam gewisse spielabläufe mit mehreren Spielern umsetzen kann, die z.B. Pässe, Bewegungen von Spielern speichert und wiedergibt auf einer 2d matrix und einer timeline, die Play/Pause und rewind etc beinhaltet","o|x|y|1J|1K|1L|q|s","5f48e66f-b9ef-421f-9b45-01f6be21aace","2026-03-05T22:05:54.647Z","Gib mir einfach eine Idee für ein modulares und erweiterbares System und schreib diese in eine Readme ","o|x|y|1N|1O|1P|q|s","3dac7d26-6f3e-48e2-a9e3-7f85ebb49951","2026-03-05T22:06:15.472Z","o|x|y|1R|1S|1D|q|s","d96cae2e-d365-49f4-a6ac-c8a5b6549e4d","55bb4c40-0d88-47ff-83e9-3361285e0516","n|VD27Xto","o|m|1U|1V|p|q|1H|1W|s","39c2d372-c84e-4b6d-8949-e9181e318a71","2026-03-05T22:16:58.857Z","Lass uns mit dem Domänenmodell starten und ein Spielfeld zur Verfügung stellen. Hilf mir dabei, eine Datenbankstruktur und Dotnet enpoints zu designen für den tech stack","o|x|y|1Y|1Z|1a|q|s","4991b5eb-4fba-40c0-94d6-50fa5cf24e32","2026-03-05T22:20:17.722Z","ib mir erst einmal die Ordner struktur für das Projekt, die Skalierbarkeit einfach macht","o|x|y|1c|1d|1e|q|s","ba026eaa-65bb-4a9c-9a81-b5d6c3b46b51","2026-03-05T22:28:51.578Z","Muss ich für api, domain etc alles eine neue Solution anlegen?","o|x|y|1g|1h|1i|q|s","a|t|12|16|1A|1E|1I|1M|1Q|1T|1X|1b|1f|1j","rich_text_json_repr","a|w|1l|i","type","content","a|1n|1o","doc","a|1n","paragraph","o|1r|1s","a|1t","o|1p|1q|1u","draft","o|1m|1D|1v|1w","o|U|8|V|W|X|Y|C|B|B|c|d|e|9|1k|9|1x","SSR vs PWA für schlechte Verbindungen\n","2026-03-05T22:23:37.139Z","2026-03-05T22:24:54.506Z","baselineTimestamp","a|Z|22","o|23|b|d","c878a2a5-c313-42df-917c-72bdb5502367","189dc09b-f98f-45db-a401-d93b9f302779","f68cbc3c-3bdf-447b-bf9a-cfd19c2a44b1","n|VD2BtOa","o|m|26|27|p|q|d|28|s","f70a9678-7499-4a63-9ac8-7bbfb72b44c6","2026-03-05T22:24:07.572Z","empfielt sich ssr für eine App, die unter Umständen in Umgebungen eingesetzt wird, wo die Internetverbindung schlecht ist?","o|x|y|2A|2B|2C|q|s","3e2f54c5-6361-4903-b1e6-048c76bb455a","2026-03-05T22:24:54.508Z","was ist eine zoneless app","o|x|y|2E|2F|2G|q|s","a|29|2D|2H","o|U|D|1z|20|21|Y|C|B|B|24|d|25|9|2I|9|1x","o|E|1y|2J","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|2L|2M","o|2N|B|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|2K|2O"],"2P"]
